systems.system_notes: Current cephalomedullary proximal femoral nailing platform for intertrochanteric, subtrochanteric, and associated proximal femur fracture fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official TFNA materials expose surgical technique resources and screw-only workflow guides for the dedicated instrument platform.

components.component_notes: Official materials describe the proximal femoral nail platform for hip fracture fixation.
Official TFNA resources describe the helical blade fixation option within the system.
Official TFNA resources describe screw-only instrumentation and lag screw fixation options.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public TFNA pages expose technique resources but this pass does not expand the full implant code matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper IFU, inventory control form, or catalogue pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
